top_signals.title: Ramaco CEO Faults China Steel Dumping for Met-Coal Miners’ Woe
top_signals.summary: Ramaco Resources Inc.’s chief executive officer said Chinese steel dumping is hammering US miners as smelters around the world try to keep pace by demanding lower costs for metallurgical coal.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S. creates $1.8B 'lawfare' fund in exchange for Trump dropping $10B IRS suit
top_signals.summary: Trump sued the IRS in late January over the leak of his tax information by an IRS employee Charles "Chaz" Littlejohn in 2019 and 2020.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
